---
title: "incplot-server Chart Gallery"
engine: knitr
params:
  server: "http://localhost:8080"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
# Set BASE so every bash chunk can use $BASE without repeating the URL.
# Override at render time: quarto render gallery.qmd -P server:http://host:port
Sys.setenv(BASE = paste0(params$server, "/incplot"))
```

```{bash register-sources}
#| include: false
# Register test data sources needed for specific chart types.
# Sources that already exist are silently overwritten; errors are ignored.
register() {
  curl -sf -X POST "$BASE/sources" \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "$1" > /dev/null || true
}

register '{
  "name": "test-heatmap",
  "label": "Test heatmap",
  "sql": "SELECT a,b,c FROM (VALUES (1,2,3),(4,5,6),(7,8,9),(2,4,6),(3,6,9)) t(a,b,c)",
  "default_type": "heatmap"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-treemap",
  "label": "Test treemap",
  "sql": "SELECT label,val FROM (VALUES ('"'"'Go'"'"',42),('"'"'Python'"'"',89),('"'"'Rust'"'"',31),('"'"'TS'"'"',67),('"'"'C++'"'"',54)) t(label,val)",
  "default_type": "treemap"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-barhs",
  "label": "Test bar single series",
  "sql": "SELECT label AS x,val AS y FROM (VALUES ('"'"'Go'"'"',42),('"'"'Python'"'"',89),('"'"'Rust'"'"',31),('"'"'TS'"'"',67),('"'"'C++'"'"',54)) t(label,val)",
  "default_type": "barV"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-barhm",
  "label": "Test bar multi-series",
  "sql": "SELECT year AS x,agri AS y1,tech AS y2,health AS y3 FROM (VALUES (2020,20,45,35),(2021,22,50,28),(2022,18,55,27),(2023,25,48,27)) t(year,agri,tech,health)",
  "default_type": "barHM"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-barh",
  "label": "Test horizontal bar",
  "sql": "SELECT label,val FROM (VALUES ('"'"'Go'"'"',42),('"'"'Python'"'"',89),('"'"'Rust'"'"',31),('"'"'TS'"'"',67)) t(label,val)",
  "default_type": "barH"
}'
```

## incplot Charts

Rendered by the [incplot](https://github.com/incom-0/incplot) CLI using braille-dot raster graphics and ANSI colour. Charts are output as self-contained HTML with embedded SVG fonts.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Line

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/german_economy&type=line&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Scatter

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/iris&type=scatter&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Vertical Bar

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhs&type=barV&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Horizontal Stacked Bar

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barHS&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Horizontal Multi Bar

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barHM&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Vertical Multi Bar

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barVM&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::::

## gotui Charts

Rendered by the [gotui](https://github.com/metaspartan/gotui) TUI widget library. Block-shade characters (░▒▓█) are used for colour mapping, displayed via an embedded asciinema player.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Heatmap

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-heatmap&type=heatmap&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Treemap

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-treemap&type=treemap&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::::

### Sparkline

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/german_economy&type=sparkline&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
```

## Pure-Go Charts

Rendered natively in Go — no external binary required.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Histogram

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/wine_quality&type=hist&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

### Box Plot

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/wine_quality&type=box&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```

:::
::::

### Horizontal Bar

```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barh&type=barH&format=html&fragment=1&width=80"
```
